UR RTDE Dashboard Studio
========================

A combined Universal Robots RTDE dashboard and Python API workspace.

The documentation is split into:

- a practical dashboard guide,
- a separate Python API guide,
- RTDE background and naming rules,
- troubleshooting notes,
- and a GitHub Pages deployment guide for Sphinx.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents

   getting_started
   rtde_background
   dashboard_guide
   python_api
   troubleshooting
   github_pages
   api_reference
